landing.headline: Your daily mental wellness journal
landing.subheadline: Track your mood, sleep, anxiety, and activity — all in one place, designed for women's mental health.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's your wellness snapshot.
dashboard.empty: No entries yet. Tap "Log Today" to get started!

log.error: Couldn't save your log. Please try again.

mood.title: How are you feeling today?
mood.description: Rate your overall mood on a scale from 1 to 10.

anxietyStress.title: Anxiety & Stress
anxietyStress.description: How anxious and stressed are you feeling?

sleep.title: How did you sleep?
sleep.description: Tell us about last night's sleep.

activity.title: Physical Activity
activity.description: Did you move your body today?

social.title: Social & Reflections
social.description: How many meaningful social interactions did you have?

symptoms.title: Symptoms
symptoms.description: Select any symptoms you noticed today.

step1.title: Welcome to LunaJoy!
step1.content: This is your personal wellness dashboard. Let's take a quick tour.

step2.title: Your wellness charts
step2.content: After a few entries, you'll see your mood, sleep, and stress patterns here.

step3.title: Log your day
step3.content: Tap here to record your daily mood, sleep, and wellness in under 2 minutes.

step4.title: Switch language
step4.content: You can switch between English and Spanish anytime.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
